description:
Agent Teams are Anthropic's latest Claude Code upgrade. These AI agents go beyond standard claude agents by communicating with each other in real time to complete tasks faster. See how this AI feature changes development.

Community with All Resources 📦: ailabspro.io 
Video code: V39

Claude just got a major upgrade. Anthropic launched Agent Teams alongside Opus 4.6, and they solve the biggest limitation of claude code sub-agents, the inability to communicate. Unlike claude code subagents, which rely on the orchestrator or local files to pass information, agent teams let members talk directly to each other through a shared mailbox system.

In this video, we show how claude ai agent teams work in real-world ai coding workflows. We use them for parallel code review, where one agent finds bugs while another fixes them simultaneously. We also demonstrate multi-perspective debugging, where multiple ai agents investigate the same issue from different angles and converge on the answer in minutes instead of ten. And we build entire application features in parallel using six coordinated agents from a single prompt.

Claude code subasgents were useful but limited. Agent teams take artificial intelligence assisted development to the next level with real coordination, shared task lists, and graceful shutdown handling. We also cover best practices our team discovered, including how to scope tasks, avoid file conflicts, prevent the lead agent from getting impatient, and properly size assignments.

Hashtags:
#ai #claudecode #claude #anthropic #aiagents #claudeai #artificialintelligence #claudeagents
tags: how to create claude code agents
fulltitle: How I Use The New Claude Code Subagnets
